ground_truth.title: Press - Tutored By Teachers
ground_truth.main_content: Tutored by Teacher features and interviews in the national and international press. Read more about our work at different districts and schools, and the research we ground our programs into. Featured news items include: 'The Case for Doubling Down on Tutoring' from The74million.org discussing how tutoring is an investment in students and the country's future. 'Tutored by Teachers Announces Strategic Investment from American Student Assistance (ASA)' highlighting strategic investment accelerating efforts to meet diverse learner needs. 'With $8.5M Investment, New Mexico Tries Once Again to Get Tutoring Right' covering New Mexico's tutoring effort with high-impact elements. 'Tutoring spurs academic gains for IPS but scaling down due to funding' about Indianapolis Public Schools scaling back promising tutoring programs. 'Tutored by Teachers Named to the GSV 150 list' recognizing transformational growth in digital learning. 'NM Public Education Secretary Praises Virtual Tutoring Program' featuring Secretary Arsenio Romero's visit to Doña Ana Elementary. 'Indianapolis Public Schools expands virtual tutoring during the school day' covering expansion after positive results. 'Can Online Tutoring Help Schools Dig Out of a Pandemic Learning Hole?' from Education Week examining online tutoring results. 'Students Are So Behind Due to Pandemic Schools Pay Millions for Tutoring' from Wall Street Journal. 'New Jersey Department of Education Selects Tutored by Teachers' for statewide high-impact tutoring. 'EdTech startup Tutored by Teachers raises over $10 million' to close opportunity gap for high-need students. 'IPS students improve performance in math, English after new tutoring program' from WFYI. 'Building Toward Effective High-Dosage Tutoring Programs' from ERS strategies. 'The good and bad of virtual on-demand tutoring' from Brookings Institution. 'Tutoring as a Student Catch-up Strategy' from Education Writers Association.
with: Tutored by Teacher features and interviews in the national and international press.
Tutoring isn't just an investment in students – it's an investment in our country's future.
Tutored by Teachers Announces Strategic Investment from American Student Assistance (ASA).
Indianapolis Public Schools is expanding virtual tutoring offered during the school day after seeing some positive results.
The good and bad of virtual on-demand tutoring - Tutoring is perhaps the best-studied and consistently effective educational intervention we have.
